speaker: speaker1
text: The bartender just gave the last call . Let's order another round , okay ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure , but let's get a pitcher this time We should be able to down it before they close .

speaker: speaker1
text: That sounds good . You order the beer while I go to the bathroom . Where is the can in this place ?

speaker: speaker2
text: It's all the way to the back . See that yellow door ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yeah . I think I can find it .

speaker: speaker2
text: You're back already . That sure was quick .

speaker: speaker1
text: That's because I just took one step inside and turned right around . That bathroom is too gross for me .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , the bartender wouldn't give me the pitcher of beer . Anyway . He said it was too close to closing time .

speaker: speaker1
text: Let's leave then . I could take some fresh air , anyway .
